title: Immersive Experience for Tricky Trials
description: A vanilla+ mod for minecraft version 1.21, making the experience more enjoyable and immersive.
body:
A Minecraft Vanilla+ modpack for version 1.21! Small mods that make the experience better with the HUD, Camera movements, Visuals of the game, Shaders, Animation for creatures and players, Distant Horizons and overall little improvements for the vanilla playthrough of the game (not making it feel too mod -ish). This also adds the essential mod so you can play with friends without using servers.

 

Inspired by the "Immersive Minecraft" modpack by MaybeCarson.
